column1: # Artemis Phase 1B allow-list — precise per-file × per-pattern × allowed_count
# legacy exemptions. Each entry caps the number of currently-permitted hits;
# adding a new matching callsite increases actual_count above allowed_count
# and the gate fails. NO WILDCARDS — every entry must specify the exact file,
# the exact banned pattern from BANNED_PATTERNS, and a positive integer count.
#   allowed_count   positive integer; max actual hits permitted today
#   reason          one sentence — what's missing in Artemis
#   removal_phase   tag of the migration that retires this entry
